article_title: Agent Harness 能力扩展：Skills、Shell、CodeAct 和后台 Agent
core_theme: Microsoft Agent Framework Harness 从四个维度扩展 Agent 能力：Skills（按需加载领域知识）、Shell（受限文件系统操作）、CodeAct（沙箱写代码计算）、后台 Agent（并发委托子任务）
reader_takeaway: 理解 Agent Harness 四种能力扩展的用途和接入方式，知道什么时候用 Skill、Shell、CodeAct 或后台 Agent
summary_angle: 四个能力维度从一个中心 Harness 向外辐射：Skills 提供知识、Shell 操作文件、CodeAct 跑计算、后台 Agent 并行委托

information_blocks.source_anchor: Skills: SKILL.md files loaded on demand; Foundry skills managed centrally
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左上：一个发光的知识卷轴或技能卡片，标注 Skills

information_blocks.source_anchor: Shell: confined working directory with deny-list, shell executor tool
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右上：一个被边界框住的终端/文件夹，标注 Shell

information_blocks.source_anchor: CodeAct: sandboxed interpreter, Hyperlight/Monty, agent writes and runs code
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左下：代码块 + 齿轮/计算符号，标注 CodeAct

information_blocks.source_anchor: Background agents: delegate to sub-agents, concurrent fan-out, aggregate results
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右下：一个主节点分出三条并行分支，标注后台 Agent

main_metaphor: 一个中央控制面板或机甲核心，四个能力模块（Skills/Shell/CodeAct/后台 Agent）作为外挂装备从四个方向接入，每个模块有独特的视觉符号
primary_subject: 一个中央 Agent Harness 核心，四个能力模块从四角接入，各模块有独立的视觉符号（知识卷轴、终端窗口、代码齿轮、并行分支箭头）
subject_action: 中央核心向外辐射连接四个能力模块，模块各自发光并带有功能标识
composition: 居中核心 + 四象限能力模块辐射式布局，2.35:1 宽屏
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: science-fiction mecha concept illustration, mechanical forms, hard-surface details, cockpit-scale cues, cool industrial palette
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；Agent Harness 的能力模块扩展像机甲外挂装备升级，适合用机械结构和模块化硬表面表达
style_safety_note: 使用泛科幻机甲描述，不引用具体作品或设计师
draft_goal: 第一轮先验证主题（中央 Harness + 四象限能力模块）、叙事信息块（Skills/Shell/CodeAct/后台 Agent）和机甲风格是否成立
revision_targets: 如果四个模块看起来太乱，减少到 3 个可见模块
如果机甲风格过于暗沉，提亮主光源和增加色彩区分
如果构图过于对称像十字架，改用斜向动态布局
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: Scaling Microsoft Agent Framework Harness capabilities across four axes -- Skills (domain knowledge loaded on demand), Shell (confined file system operations), CodeAct (sandboxed code execution), Background Agents (concurrent sub-agent delegation).

Summary angle: Four capability modules radiating from a central Agent Harness core -- Skills provides knowledge, Shell operates files, CodeAct runs computation, Background Agents delegate in parallel.
Narrative flow: layered reveal of four capability expansions around a central core.
Information blocks:
- mechanism: Skills -- SKILL.md knowledge cards loaded on demand, Foundry skills managed centrally (top-left, knowledge scroll/skill card icon)
- mechanism: Shell -- confined working directory, deny-list policy, shell executor (top-right, bounded terminal/folder icon)
- mechanism: CodeAct -- sandboxed interpreter, Hyperlight/Monty, agent writes and runs code (bottom-left, code block with gear icon)
- mechanism: Background Agents -- delegate to sub-agents, concurrent fan-out, aggregate (bottom-right, fan-out branching arrows)

Main metaphor: a central core (Agent Harness) with four modular capability attachments (like mecha equipment modules) connecting from four directions, each with distinct visual symbols.
Subject: a central Harness core unit with four capability modules attached from four corners, each emitting its own glow and bearing a functional icon.
Composition: centered core with four-quadrant radiating modules, wide 2.35:1 layout.
Style/medium: combine editorial technical illustration with science-fiction mecha concept illustration, mechanical forms, hard-surface details, cockpit-scale cues, cool industrial palette. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: cool steel, electric blue, warm amber, dark carbon.
Visible text policy: allow 4 short labels: 'Skills', 'Shell', 'CodeAct', '后台 Agent'. Each label short. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans.
Constraints: no watermark, no prompt residue, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake diagrams.
Avoid: floating chips, code rain, neon cityscape, generic robot, cyberpunk glow, HUD overlays, poster titles, fake terminals.
